heading: False statements and misrepresentations
label: 8507 False statements and misrepresentations
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .42 U.S.C. 1368(b), “Sec. 1508(b)”, .Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1212, § 4(a)68 Stat. 1135In subsection (a), the words “as the case may be”, “be liable to”, and “of any amount” are omitted as unnecessary.Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .42 U.S.C. 1368(b), “Sec. 1508(b)”, .Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1212, § 4(a)68 Stat. 1135In subsection (a), the words “as the case may be”, “be liable to”, and “of any amount” are omitted as unnecessary.Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.

children.text: knowingly has made, or caused to be made by another, a false statement or representation of a material fact, or knowingly has failed, or caused another to fail, to disclose a material fact; and
as a result of that action has received an amount as compensation under this subchapter to which he was not entitled;
deposited in the fund from which payment was made, if the repayment was to a State agency; or
returned to the Treasury of the United States and credited to the current applicable appropriation, fund, or account from which payment was made, if the repayment was to the Secretary.
